caption: A man is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, gold-colored suspenders, and a distinctive tall, spiky silver wig. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a clothing rack featuring garments and a "LEE" brand tag. An on-screen logo reads "THE GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his head and facial expressions as he talks. In the final frames, his head turns slightly to his right while he continues speaking, maintaining a steady gaze. The lighting is bright and consistent across the studio environment, highlighting the textures of his outfit and the detailed arrangement of the backdrop.
